description: Memoized semantic tree (cell-model.md § Memoized semantic tree). One memo slot per node folds (node value, child derived values). Editing one node recomputes only its ANCESTOR CHAIN — a sibling subtree's derived slot stays cached. A node edit that does not change the folded result MUST NOT re-run a downstream consumer (memo equality guard). Cost is proportional to the diff, not the document.

scenarios.name: edit recomputes only ancestor chain, not siblings
memo guard stops propagation when folded result unchanged
